attributes.description: High-level Kafka cluster health: broker count, consumer lag, replication status, and consumer group membership. For ES superusers and administrators of production Kafka clusters.

embeddableConfig.content:
## [Kafka OTel] Overview

Cluster health at a glance:
- Broker count stability 
- Total consumer lag across all groups 
- Under-replicated partition count
- Consumer groups with zero members
- Topic and partition topology

query.esql:
TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.brokers IS NOT NULL
| STATS brokers = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(kafka.brokers)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.brokers IS NOT NULL
| STATS brokers = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(kafka.brokers)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum)
    BY attributes.group, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS total_lag = SUM(lag) BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum)
    BY attributes.group, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS total_lag = SUM(lag) BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum)
    BY attributes.group, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS total_lag = SUM(lag) BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag_sum = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group
| SORT lag_sum DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag_sum = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group
| SORT lag_sum DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag_sum = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group
| SORT lag_sum DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group, attributes.topic
| STATS lag_sum = SUM(lag) BY attributes.topic
| SORT lag_sum DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group, attributes.topic
| STATS lag_sum = SUM(lag) BY attributes.topic
| SORT lag_sum DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group, attributes.topic
| STATS lag_sum = SUM(lag) BY attributes.topic
| SORT lag_sum DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.members IS NOT NULL
| STATS members = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.members) BY attributes.group
| EVAL member_status = CASE(members == 0, "0 (empty)", members > 0 AND members <= 5, "1-5", members > 5 AND members <= 20, "6-20", "20+")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY member_status
| SORT count DESC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.members IS NOT NULL
| STATS members = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.members) BY attributes.group
| EVAL member_status = CASE(members == 0, "0 (empty)", members > 0 AND members <= 5, "1-5", members > 5 AND members <= 20, "6-20", "20+")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY member_status
| SORT count DESC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.members IS NOT NULL
| STATS members = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.members) BY attributes.group
| EVAL member_status = CASE(members == 0, "0 (empty)", members > 0 AND members <= 5, "1-5", members > 5 AND members <= 20, "6-20", "20+")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY member_status
| SORT count DESC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync)
    BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL under_replicated = replicas - in_sync
| WHERE under_replicated > 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync)
    BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL under_replicated = replicas - in_sync
| WHERE under_replicated > 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync)
    BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL under_replicated = replicas - in_sync
| WHERE under_replicated > 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.topic.partitions IS NOT NULL
| STATS partitions = MAX(kafka.topic.partitions) BY attributes.topic
| SORT partitions DESC
| LIMIT 50

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.topic.partitions IS NOT NULL
| STATS partitions = MAX(kafka.topic.partitions) BY attributes.topic
| SORT partitions DESC
| LIMIT 50

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.topic.partitions IS NOT NULL
| STATS partitions = MAX(kafka.topic.partitions) BY attributes.topic
| SORT partitions DESC
| LIMIT 50

FROM metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.topic.partitions IS NOT NULL
| STATS unique_topics = COUNT_DISTINCT(attributes.topic)

FROM metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.topic.partitions IS NOT NULL
| STATS unique_topics = COUNT_DISTINCT(attributes.topic)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.brokers IS NOT NULL
| STATS brokers = MAX(kafka.brokers)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.brokers IS NOT NULL
| STATS brokers = MAX(kafka.brokers)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS latest_lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group
| STATS total_lag = SUM(latest_lag)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS latest_lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group
| STATS total_lag = SUM(latest_lag)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS latest_lag = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.lag_sum) BY attributes.group
| STATS total_lag = SUM(latest_lag)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas),
        in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync)
  BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| WHERE replicas > in_sync
| STATS under_replicated_partitions = COUNT(*)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas),
        in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync)
  BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| WHERE replicas > in_sync
| STATS under_replicated_partitions = COUNT(*)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas),
        in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync)
  BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| WHERE replicas > in_sync
| STATS under_replicated_partitions = COUNT(*)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.members IS NOT NULL
| STATS members = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.members) BY attributes.group
| WHERE members == 0
| STATS empty_groups = COUNT(*)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.consumer_group.members IS NOT NULL
| STATS members = MAX(kafka.consumer_group.members) BY attributes.group
| WHERE members == 0
| STATS empty_groups = COUNT(*)

attributes.title: [Kafka OTel] Overview
